description.text: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.

ru.original: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.
ru.translation: Толстые стены выдержат яростный натиск врага. Одна база.

es.original: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.
es.translation:
Combate sin tregua bajo la luz de la luna.
Un núcleo.

de.original: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.
de.translation: Mächtige Festungsmauern erheben sich gegen den Ansturm der Gegner. Eine Basis.

pt.original: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.
pt.translation: Espessas muralhas de fortaleza resistem a um furioso ataque do outro lado. Uma Base.

fr.original: Thick fortress walls stand strong against the onslaught of the other side. One Base.
fr.translation: Des murs défensifs épais résistent aux vagues d'assaut. Une base.
